metrics.name: Total duels won, %
metrics.description: Percentage of all duels successfully won

metrics.name: Ball recoveries per 90
metrics.description: Ball recoveries per 90 minutes (proxy for interceptions)

metrics.name: Clearances per 90
metrics.description: Defensive clearances per 90 minutes (proxy for successful defensive actions)

metrics.name: Passes to final third per 90
metrics.description: Accurate passes into the final third per 90 minutes (proxy for progressive passes)

metrics.name: Accurate long passes, %
metrics.description: Accuracy of long passes (proxy for accurate progressive distribution)

metrics.name: Key passes per 90
metrics.description: Key passes per 90 minutes reflecting central attacking contribution

metrics.name: Dribbled past per 90
metrics.description: Times beaten by a dribble per 90 minutes (lower is better for transition security)

metrics.name: Fouls per 90
metrics.description: Fouls committed per 90 minutes (lower is better)

core_10_model.scoring_method: Each metric is computed from Sofascore raw stats per the computation formula, then converted to percentile (0-100). For inverse metrics (higher_is_better: false), the inverted percentile is used. Category score = average percentile of metrics in that category. Final score = sum(category_score * category_weight).
